use_cases: Hero section background with interactive ripple effects on mouse movement
Landing page decorative element to increase engagement and visual interest
Portfolio or showcase pages as an interactive visual centerpiece
Product demo backgrounds that react to user input
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based dot grid component that generates colorful ripple effects triggered by mouse movement and clicks. Features auto-ripple animation, randomized color generation for each grid cell, and configurable ripple parameters. Designed as an engaging background element for landing pages and showcase sections.
